overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a luxurious modern building interior in a video game, transitioning from a red-walled lobby with white planters through a glass grid door into a dark corridor illuminated by red neon floor lights and dramatic overhead lighting. The footage showcases high-end architectural visualization with cyberpunk aesthetic influences.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a spacious, modern lobby characterized by striking red walls and symmetrical white marble planters. Warm wall sconces provide ambient lighting as the camera approaches a large glass grid door at the far end, with wooden ceiling slats overhead and windows revealing exterior greenery on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark futuristic corridor with red neon floor accents and overhead skylight

events.description: dramatic shift from warm mixed lighting to dark environment with green overhead light and red neon floor illumination
slight turn to the right while continuing forward through the corridor

agents.ego_description: proceeding cautiously through the dimly lit corridor, observing the red neon light strips lining the floor

vertical red neon light strips embedded in the floor on both sides
large rectangular overhead light fixture emitting greenish-yellow illumination
dark gray concrete walls enclosing the corridor
perforated metal mesh paneling on the left wall

segments.scene_description: Having passed through the glass door, the scene transforms into a dark, atmospheric corridor illuminated by dramatic green overhead lighting and red neon floor strips. The camera continues forward through the concrete passageway, passing metal mesh wall panels on the left while the warm lobby fades behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, luxurious lobby into a dark, atmospheric cyberpunk corridor. It begins by gliding through a spacious interior defined by striking red walls, symmetrical white marble planters, and warm ambient lighting under wooden ceiling slats. As the camera approaches and passes through a large glass grid door, the warm tones of the lobby fade away, giving way to a starkly different environment. The scene then shifts into a concrete passageway where the lighting transforms into dramatic green overhead glows and red neon floor strips. The camera continues forward through this moody corridor, passing metal mesh wall panels as the space narrows into a high-contrast architectural tunnel.
